title: No Textures Pack
description: No Textures Pack. All you get are weird purple blocks Notch made for missing textures. Beta 1.7.3
body:
# No Textures Pack! Beta 1.7.3 Texture Pack. 

This Texture Pack is purposely bad. Really no effort was put into this.

This is an old style texture back for version beta 1.7.3

Way back in the day when Texture Sheets were still a thing, there was a section for unuse/not yet made blocks. It was this weird purple-ish/pink box. I turned everything into that texture.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/1FegjRUCPTg" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
